[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A cropped screenshot-like image shows a line of text on the left, including “cGPB crew by Miqw +”, and two green numeric UI elements on the right, “07.49” and “446”.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is the text “cGPB crew by Miqw +” and a longer sentence starting with “z... belakang sd mengirim i ...” alongside green interface numbers on the right.

Setting:
This appears to be a digital interface or app screenshot on a white background, with no physical environment visible.

Visual Details:
The background is white. On the left there is a circular, faded graphic badge with cursive text around its edge and a small heart-like shape in the center. To the right of the badge is black text in a large, bold, sans-serif style reading “cGPB crew by Miqw +”. Below it there is another line of lighter-weight black text beginning “zah belakang sd mengirim i ~ ...”. On the upper right is a green time-like number “07.49”. Beneath it is a green rounded rectangle containing “446”, preceded by a green “@” symbol. The composition is horizontal and tightly cropped, with the text aligned left and the green UI elements aligned right.

Visible Text:
cGPB crew by Miqw +
zah belakang sd mengirim i ~ ...
07.49
@ 446

Practical Summary:
The image shows a white interface area with posted text on the left. On the right, it displays a green time value and a green count next to an “@” symbol.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

{GPB crew by Miqiw +  
zah belakang sd mengirimj ~ ...

07.49  
@ 446

# Structured Version

- **Text (caption):**
  - `{GPB crew by Miqiw +`
  - `zah belakang sd mengirimj ~ ...`

- **Right-side metadata:**
  - `07.49`
  - `@ 446`

# Notes

- The word **“mengirimj”** and the trailing **“~ ...”** are taken as shown, but parts may be slightly unclear due to image resolution.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
